name: remove_component
description: Remove a component from an existing GameObject in the current scene. Specify the GameObject name and the component type to remove. Cannot remove Transform components.

game_object_name.description: The name of the GameObject to remove the component from.

component_type.description: The type name of the component to remove, e.g. 'Rigidbody', 'BoxCollider', or a custom script class name like 'PlayerController'.
